ogTitle: Jews Lagoon vs Jiggi: Climate Safety

heading: Jews Lagoon vs Jiggi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jews Lagoon, New South Wales and Jiggi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jews Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jiggi (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jews Lagoon or Jiggi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jews Lagoon has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Jiggi scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jews Lagoon scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Jiggi scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jews Lagoon or Jiggi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jews Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
